name: Marlin Wong
text:
**Errors found (6) — Somewhat sure:**

Error 1: 94.2% accuracy on GMS8K is basically impossible
Error 2: SRP outperforms GPT4 and Claude Sonnet - SRP is a prompting strategy, not a model
Error 3: CURATED subset of GSM8K is not the full GSM8K
Error 4: SRP can be "applied to any autoregressive language model"
Error 5: "improves model accuracy on math word problems (doesn't specify)"
Error 6: Doesn't describe how SRP is new from CoT
